acceptance_criteria.given: a persistent project document is required
acceptance_criteria.then: the requirement defines audience, purpose, authority, update trigger, verification, maintenance rule, and retirement condition

object: audience, purpose, authority, update trigger, verification, maintenance rule, and retirement condition for each persistent document
rationale: A document is maintainable only when its intended outcome and lifecycle are explicit rather than implied by the file's existence.
subject: project documentation process
title: Persistent documentation lifecycle

verification.evidence: repository contract test and requirement trace inspection
